title: Tests should be stable
description: Tests should be stableAnalyze your codeadaptability-testedmaintainabilityreliabilityCode SmelltestsdesignunpredictableWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoUnstable / flaky tests are tests which sometimes pass and sometimes fail, without any code change. Obviously, they slow down developments when developers have to rerun failed tests. However, the real problem is that you can’t completely trust these tests, they might fail for many different reasons and you don’t know if any of them will happen in production.Some tools, such as Jest, enable developers to automatically retry flaky tests.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
